description: Style Note Wear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product Details Lavender kurta, has dark brown panel at the yoke with pink tucks and decorative buttons, colourful piping around the neckline and sleeves, round neckline, sleeveless, border at the front hemline and side slits Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean onlySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
